title: Shallow-water convergence of the intermediate long wave equation in $L^2$
summary: We continue our study on the convergence issue of the intermediate long wave equation (ILW) on both the real line and the circle. In particular, we establish convergence of the scaled ILW dynamics to that of the Korteweg-de Vries equation (KdV) in the shallow-water limit at the $L^2$-level. Together with the recent work by the first three authors and D. Pilod (2024) on the deep-water convergence in $L^2$, this work completes the well-posedness and convergence study of ILW on both geometries within the $L^2$-framework. Our proof equally applies to both geometries and is based on the following two ingredients: the complete integrability of ILW and the normal form method. More precisely, by making use of the Lax pair structure and the perturbation determinant for ILW, recently introduced by Harrop-Griffths, Killip, and Vişan (2025), we first establish weakly uniform (in small depth parameters) equicontinuity in $L^2$ of solutions to the scaled ILW, providing a control on the high frequency part of solutions. Then, we treat the low frequency part by implementing a perturbative argument based on an infinite iteration of normal form reductions for KdV.

AI.tldr: 建立了中间长波方程(ILW)在浅水极限下到KdV方程的L²收敛性，完成了ILW在实线和圆上L²框架下的适定性和收敛性研究
AI.motivation: 研究中间长波方程(ILW)在不同几何结构(实线和圆)上的收敛性问题，特别关注浅水极限下ILW到KdV方程的动力学收敛，与之前研究的深水极限收敛形成完整理论框架
AI.techniques: 利用ILW的完全可积性(Lax对结构)和扰动行列式建立弱一致等度连续性，结合基于KdV无穷迭代正规形式约化的摄动论证
AI.main_theorems: 证明了缩放ILW动力学在浅水极限下以L²范数收敛到KdV方程，建立了ILW在实线和圆上L²框架下的适定性和收敛性完整理论
AI.significance: 完成了ILW方程在L²框架下的完整收敛理论，统一处理了实线和圆两种几何结构，为可积系统极限行为研究提供了新方法，连接了ILW和KdV两个重要可积方程

title: Data-Driven Parameter Identification for Tumor Growth Models
summary: Modeling tumor growth accurately is essential for understanding cancer progression and informing treatment strategies. To estimate the parameters in the tumor growth model described by a nonlinear PDE, we adopt Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs), which show advantages especially when the observation data is scarce and contains noise. With the help of real-life lab data, we have demonstrated the potential of applying deep learning tools to address data-driven modeling for tumor growth in biology.

AI.tldr: 使用物理信息神经网络(PINNs)估计肿瘤生长非线性PDE模型参数，特别适用于数据稀缺且含噪声的情况
AI.motivation: 准确建模肿瘤生长对理解癌症进展和指导治疗策略至关重要，但传统方法在数据稀缺且含噪声时面临挑战
AI.techniques: 物理信息神经网络(PINNs)，结合物理定律约束和神经网络，处理非线性PDE参数估计问题
AI.main_theorems: 展示了PINNs在肿瘤生长模型参数估计中的有效性，特别是在数据稀缺和含噪声条件下优于传统方法
AI.significance: 为生物医学中的肿瘤生长建模提供了新的数据驱动方法，将深度学习工具成功应用于实际生物学问题，具有临床应用潜力

title: An $L^2$-quantitative global approximation for the Stokes initial-boundary value problem
summary: We establish the first quantitative Runge approximation theorem, with explicit $L^2$-estimates, for the 3d nonstationary Stokes system on a bounded spatial domain. This result addresses the two primary limitations of the qualitative result [H.-Sueur, 2025] obtained in collaboration with Franck Sueur: first, it bypasses the non-constructive Hahn-Banach theorem used in [H.-Sueur, 2025], precluding quantitative estimates; and second, it extends the scope of the theory from interior approximations to the physically important initial-boundary value problem. Our proof is founded on the modern quantitative framework of [Rüland-Salo, 2019], which we adapt to the Stokes system by combining semigroup theory with a quantitative approximation for the associated resolvent problem.

AI.tldr: 建立了三维非定常Stokes系统在边界区域上的首个定量Runge逼近定理，包含显式L²估计
AI.motivation: 解决[H.-Sueur, 2025]中定性结果的局限性：1) 绕过非构造性的Hahn-Banach定理以获得定量估计；2) 将理论从内部逼近扩展到物理上重要的初边值问题
AI.techniques: 结合半群理论和相关预解问题的定量逼近，将[Rüland-Salo, 2019]的现代定量框架适配到Stokes系统
AI.main_theorems: 建立了三维非定常Stokes系统在边界空间区域上的首个定量Runge逼近定理，包含显式L²估计
AI.significance: 为Stokes系统的控制理论和反问题提供了定量工具，将Runge逼近从定性发展到定量，从内部问题扩展到边值问题

title: Liouville--Type Results for Infinity Elliptic Equations Involving Gradient and Hardy--Hénon Nonlinearities
summary:
In this paper we study Liouville-type properties for a class of degenerate elliptic equations driven by the fractional infinity Laplacian with nonlinear lower-order terms, \[ Δ_\infty^βu - c\,H(u,\nabla u) - λ\, f(|x|,u)=0 \qquad \text{in }\mathbb{R}^n, \] where $β\in[0,2]$, $Δ_\infty^β$ denotes the fractional infinity Laplace operator, and the nonlinearities $H$ and $f$ represent Hamiltonian and Hardy--Hénon type effects, respectively. We extend the Liouville theory for the classical and normalized infinity Laplacian by establishing a new weighted comparison principle together with sharp local Lipschitz estimates for viscosity solutions.
  Our Liouville theorems are derived from precise growth conditions for bounded nonnegative solutions when $f$ exhibits power-type behavior, i.e.\ $f\sim u^γ$. We also treat the exponential case $f\sim e^u$, for which the equation becomes strongly supercritical: under suitable assumptions on the growth of $u$ at spatial infinity, only partial Liouville-type conclusions can be obtained.
  The analysis relies on radial reduction, barrier constructions, and refined comparison arguments. Altogether, the results provide a unified framework linking regularity, comparison principles, and Liouville-type phenomena for degenerate elliptic equations involving fractional infinity Laplacians and nonlinear lower-order effects.

AI.tldr: 建立了分数阶无穷大拉普拉斯算子驱动的退化椭圆方程的李雅普诺夫型理论，统一了正则性、比较原理和不存在性现象
AI.motivation: 研究具有非线性低阶项的分数阶无穷大拉普拉斯算子退化椭圆方程的李雅普诺夫型性质，扩展经典和归一化无穷大拉普拉斯算子的李雅普诺夫理论
AI.techniques: 径向约化、障碍函数构造、精细比较论证、加权比较原理、尖锐局部Lipschitz估计
AI.main_theorems: 建立了新的加权比较原理和局部Lipschitz估计；当f具有幂型行为时，对有界非负解得到精确增长条件的李雅普诺夫定理；对指数型f得到部分李雅普诺夫型结论
AI.significance: 为涉及分数阶无穷大拉普拉斯算子和非线性低阶效应的退化椭圆方程提供了统一框架，连接了正则性、比较原理和李雅普诺夫型现象

title: On some uniqueness results
summary: This paper aims to extend the results of Serrin and Tang in [{\it Indiana Univ. Math. J., 49 (2000), 897--923}] to the low-dimensional case. Specifically, the paper deals with the radial solutions of the following overdetermined problem $$ \begin{cases} -Δ_m u=f(u),\quad u>0~\hbox{in}~B_R,\\ u=\partial_νu=0~\hbox{on}~\partial B_R, \end{cases} $$ where $B_R$ is the open ball of $\mathbb{R}^N$ centered at 0 and with radius $R>0$. We prove uniqueness when $1\leq N\leq m$ {and $m>1$} under certain suitable assumptions on~$f$. Additionally, this work is motivated by the sharp Gagliardo-Nirenberg/Nash inequality. While the framework presented in this article is standard and closely resembles that of Serrin and Tang, the detail of our proofs differ significantly. It is important to note that Serrin and Tang explicitly stated (see Subsection~6.2 of their work) that {\it``the proofs in the present paper rely extensively on the assumption $N>m$ and cannot be extended easily to values $N\leq m$."}

AI.tldr: 将Serrin和Tang关于m-Laplace算子过定问题的唯一性结果扩展到低维情形(N≤m)
AI.motivation: Serrin和Tang在2000年的工作中研究了m-Laplace算子过定问题的径向解唯一性，但他们的证明严重依赖于N>m的假设，明确表示无法扩展到N≤m的低维情形。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，将结果扩展到低维情况，同时受到尖锐的Gagliardo-Nirenberg/Nash不等式的启发。
AI.techniques: 采用与Serrin和Tang类似的标准框架，但证明细节显著不同，专门处理N≤m的低维情况。主要技术包括对m-Laplace算子的分析、径向解的研究以及过定边界条件的处理。
AI.main_theorems: 在1≤N≤m且m>1的条件下，对满足特定条件的非线性项f，证明了m-Laplace过定问题径向解的唯一性，成功将Serrin-Tang的结果扩展到低维情形。
AI.significance: 解决了Serrin和Tang工作中明确指出的理论局限，完整了m-Laplace算子过定问题唯一性理论，为低维情况下的相关分析提供了理论基础，对椭圆型偏微分方程理论有重要贡献。

title: Liouville theorems for fully nonlinear elliptic equations on half spaces
summary: In this note, we prove two Liouville theorems for fully nonlinear uniformly elliptic equations on half spaces. The main tools are the boundary pointwise regularity, the Hopf type estimate and the Carleson type estimate. Our new proof is rather short.

AI.tldr: 证明了全非线性一致椭圆方程在半空间上的两个刘维尔型定理
AI.motivation: 研究全非线性一致椭圆方程在半空间上的解的性质，特别是解在无穷远处的行为，这是椭圆方程理论中的经典问题
AI.techniques: 边界点态正则性、Hopf型估计、Carleson型估计
AI.main_theorems: 两个刘维尔型定理：在全非线性一致椭圆方程在半空间上满足特定边界条件时，解必须是常数或线性函数
AI.significance: 提供了更简洁的证明方法，深化了对非线性椭圆方程在半空间上解的结构理解，为相关研究提供了新的技术工具

title: Spreading Properties of a City-Road Reaction-Diffusion Model on One-Dimensional Lattice
summary: We propose and study a new model to describe biological invasions constrained on infinite homogeneous one dimensional metric graphs. Our model consists of an infinite PDE-ODE system where, at each vertex of the one-dimensional lattice $\mathbb{Z}$, we have a logistic equation, and connections between vertices are given by diffusion equations on the edges supplemented with Robin like boundary conditions at the vertices. We establish the main properties of the system and study the long time behavior of the solutions, especially by characterizing an asymptotic spreading speed for the system. In the fast diffusion regime, we derive a novel asymptotic model which exhibits similar propagation properties as the classical discrete Fisher-KPP on the one-dimensional lattice $\mathbb{Z}$.

AI.tldr: 提出并研究了一个描述无限齐次一维度量图上生物入侵的新模型，建立了系统的主要性质并刻画了渐近传播速度。
AI.motivation: 研究生物入侵在无限齐次一维度量图上的传播动力学，这类图由顶点和边构成，顶点处有逻辑方程描述局部种群动态，边上的扩散方程描述个体在顶点间的迁移。
AI.techniques: 使用无限PDE-ODE系统建模，结合逻辑方程、扩散方程和Robin型边界条件；分析长时间行为，在快速扩散区域推导渐近模型。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了系统的主要性质，研究了解的长时间行为，特别刻画了系统的渐近传播速度；在快速扩散区域推导出与经典离散Fisher-KPP模型具有相似传播性质的新渐近模型。
AI.significance: 为度量图上的反应扩散系统提供了新的理论框架，连接了连续扩散模型和离散传播模型，对理解网络结构上的生物入侵动力学有重要意义。

title: The Immersed Boundary Problem in 2-D: the Navier-Stokes Case
summary: We study the immersed boundary problem in 2-D. It models a 1-D elastic closed string immersed and moving in a fluid that fills the entire plane, where the fluid motion is governed by the 2-D incompressible Navier-Stokes equation with a positive Reynolds number subject to a singular forcing exerted by the string. We introduce the notion of mild solutions to this system, and prove its existence, uniqueness, and optimal regularity estimates when the initial string configuration is $C^1$ and satisfies the well-stretched condition and when the initial flow field $u_0$ lies in $L^p(\mathbb{R}^2)$ with $p\in (2,\infty)$. A blow-up criterion is also established. When the Reynolds number is sent to zero, we show convergence in short time of the solution to that of the Stokes case of 2-D immersed boundary problem, with the optimal error estimates derived. We prove the energy law of the system when $u_0$ additionally belongs to $L^2(\mathbb{R}^2)$. Lastly, we show that the solution is global when the initial data is sufficiently close to an equilibrium state.

AI.tldr: 建立了二维浸没边界问题mild解的存在唯一性、正则性估计和收敛性结果
AI.motivation: 研究二维浸没边界问题，该问题模拟一维弹性闭弦浸没在充满整个平面的流体中运动，流体运动由带正雷诺数的二维不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程描述，受到弦施加的奇异力作用。
AI.techniques: 引入mild解概念，利用Navier-Stokes方程理论、奇异积分估计、正则性分析、能量方法、稳定性分析和收敛性分析
AI.main_theorems: 1) 当初始弦配置C¹且满足well-stretched条件，初始流场u₀∈Lᵖ(ℝ²)(p>2)时，存在唯一mild解并具有最优正则性估计；2) 建立爆破准则；3) 雷诺数趋于零时短时间收敛到Stokes情形并给出最优误差估计；4) 当u₀∈L²时证明能量律；5) 初始数据充分接近平衡态时证明全局解存在性
AI.significance: 为二维浸没边界问题建立了系统的数学理论框架，包括适定性、正则性、收敛性和稳定性结果，为流体-结构相互作用问题提供了严格数学基础

title: Dynamics of Ideal Fluid Flows
summary: We will discuss various aspects of the incompressible Euler equation. We will discuss, in particular, problems related to the least action principle, the existence of special solutions, the problem of solvability, singularity formation, and asymptotic behavior.

AI.tldr: 对不可压缩欧拉方程多个核心问题的综述性讨论
AI.motivation: 不可压缩欧拉方程作为理想流体力学的基本方程，存在许多未解决的数学问题，包括最小作用原理、特殊解存在性、可解性问题、奇点形成和渐近行为等
AI.techniques: 综述性讨论，可能涉及变分法、几何分析、偏微分方程理论、动力系统方法等
AI.main_theorems: 这是综述性讨论，没有具体定理，但会涵盖欧拉方程研究中的主要数学问题和进展
AI.significance: 系统梳理不可压缩欧拉方程的核心数学问题，为后续研究提供方向，对流体力学数学理论和偏微分方程理论有重要意义

title: Asymptotic behavior and sharp estimates for spreading fronts in a cooperative system with free boundaries
summary: This paper investigates the dynamics of a reaction-diffusion system with two free boundaries, modeling the invasion of two cooperative species, where the free boundaries represent expanding fronts. We first analyze the long-term behavior of the system, showing that it follows a spreading-vanishing dichotomy: the two species either spread across the entire region or eventually die out. In the case of spreading, we determine the asymptotic spreading speed of the fronts by using a semi-wave system and provide sharp estimates for the moving fronts. Additionally, we show that the solution to the system converges to the corresponding semi-wave solution as time tends to infinity. These results contribute to a deeper understanding of the long-term dynamics of cooperative species in reaction-diffusion systems with free boundaries.

AI.tldr: 研究具有两个自由边界的反应扩散系统中合作物种入侵的动力学，建立了传播-消亡二分法并确定了渐近传播速度。
AI.motivation: 研究两个合作物种在反应扩散系统中通过自由边界扩张的入侵动力学，自由边界代表扩张前沿，旨在理解合作物种在空间扩张中的长期行为。
AI.techniques: 使用半波系统方法分析自由边界问题，通过渐近分析确定传播速度，利用比较原理和上下解技术研究长期行为。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了传播-消亡二分法：两个物种要么在整个区域传播，要么最终消亡；在传播情况下，确定了前沿的渐近传播速度，并证明解收敛到相应的半波解。
AI.significance: 深化了对具有自由边界的反应扩散系统中合作物种长期动力学的理解，为生态入侵模型提供了严格的理论分析框架。

title: The analysis of resonant frequencies and blow-up estimates of close-to-touching subwavelength resonators in the two-dimensional Helmholtz system
summary: In this paper, we investigate wave scattering by a pair of closely spaced inclusions embedded in a homogeneous medium, characterized by a high contrast physical parameters. The system is modeled by the two-dimensional Helmholtz equation. We show that this configuration exhibits two sub-wavelength resonant modes, whose frequencies display distinct leading-order asymptotic behaviors. These findings differ significantly from those in the three-dimensional Helmholtz setting. Furthermore, we provide a quantitative analysis of the gradient blow-up rates for the wave field localized between the two resonators.

AI.tldr: 研究二维Helmholtz方程中一对紧密相邻高对比度夹杂的波散射问题，发现两种亚波长共振模式及其频率的渐近行为
AI.motivation: 研究二维空间中紧密相邻高对比度夹杂的波散射问题，特别关注三维与二维Helmholtz方程中共振行为的差异
AI.techniques: 使用二维Helmholtz方程建模，采用渐近分析方法，研究亚波长共振模式，分析梯度爆炸速率
AI.main_theorems: 发现两种亚波长共振模式，其频率具有不同的主导阶渐近行为；提供了波场在两谐振器之间局部化区域的梯度爆炸速率定量分析
AI.significance: 揭示了二维与三维Helmholtz方程中紧密相邻高对比度夹杂共振行为的本质差异，为亚波长共振器设计提供理论指导

title: Mosco convergence framework for singular limits of gradient flows on Hilbert spaces with applications
summary: We consider the question of convergence of a sequence of gradient flows defined on different Hilbert spaces. In order to give meaning to this idea, we introduce a notion of connecting operators. This permits us to generalize the concept of Mosco convergence of functionals to our present setting, and state a desired convergence result for gradient flows, which we then prove. We present a variety of examples, including thin domains, dynamic boundary conditions, and discrete-to-continuum limits.

AI.tldr: 提出了连接算子的概念，将梯度流在不同希尔伯特空间上的收敛问题统一处理，并推广了Mosco收敛到更一般的设置。
AI.motivation: 研究不同希尔伯特空间上定义的梯度流序列的收敛性问题，为处理薄域、动态边界条件和离散到连续极限等应用场景提供统一框架。
AI.techniques: 引入连接算子概念，推广Mosco收敛到不同希尔伯特空间设置，建立梯度流收敛的一般理论框架。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了梯度流在不同希尔伯特空间上的收敛定理，证明了在连接算子和广义Mosco收敛条件下梯度流的收敛性。
AI.significance: 为处理各种极限问题（如薄域极限、离散连续极限）提供了统一的理论工具，扩展了梯度流理论的应用范围。

title: Regularity for elliptic equations with monomial weights
summary: We study regularity properties for solutions to elliptic equations that are degenerate or singular along orthogonal hyperplanes. The degenerate ellipticity is carried out by a weight term which is the monomial product of different powers of the distance functions to each hyperplane; that is, given the space dimension $d\geq2$, the number of orthogonally crossing hyperplanes $1\leq n\leq d$ and the generic variable point $z=(x,y)\in\mathbb R^{d-n}\times\mathbb R^n$, then the weight is given by $ω(y)=\prod_{i=1}^ny_i^{a_i}$ with $a_i>-1$, $y_i=\mathrm{dist}(z,Σ_i)$ and $Σ_i=\{y_i=0\}$. We prove $C^{0,α}$ and $C^{1,α}$ estimates up to the corners formed by the intersections of two or more hyperplanes, for solutions of the conormal problem with variable coefficients. This is done by a regularization-approximation procedure, a blow-up argument and Liouville theorems. Finally, we provide smoothness of solutions when the equation is isotropic and homogeneous, and we show an application to Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg inequalities with monomial weights.

AI.tldr: 证明了在正交超平面交叉处具有单项式权重的退化椭圆方程解的角点正则性
AI.motivation: 研究沿正交超平面退化或奇异的椭圆方程的正则性，这类问题出现在具有单项式权重的偏微分方程中，与Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg不等式等应用相关
AI.techniques: 正则化-逼近方法、爆破论证、刘维尔定理、角点处的Hölder估计
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在正交超平面交叉形成的角点处解的C^{0,α}和C^{1,α}估计，对于各向同性齐次方程给出解的光滑性，并应用于单项式权重的Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg不等式
AI.significance: 建立了具有单项式权重的退化椭圆方程在角点处的正则性理论，为处理奇异权重问题提供了新工具，扩展了Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg不等式的应用范围

title: Non-isoparametric Serrin domains of $\mathbb{S}^3$ with connected toric boundary
summary:
We investigate the overdetermined torsion problem
  $\begin{cases} -Δu = 1 & \text{in}\ Ω\\ u=0 & \text{on}\ \partial Ω\\ \frac{\partial u}{\partial ν}=\text{const.} & \text{on}\ \partial Ω, \end{cases}$
  where $Ω$ is a smooth Riemannian domain. Domains admitting a solution to this problem are called \textit{Serrin domains}, after the celebrated work of Serrin \cite{Se71}, where is proved that in $\mathbb{R}^n$ such domains are geodesic balls. In the present paper we establish the existence of two distinct types of Serrin domains of $\mathbb{S}^3$, respectively of small and large volume, each of whose boundary is connected and is neither isometric to a geodesic sphere nor to a Clifford torus. These domains arise as nontrivial perturbations of some classical symmetric solutions to the same problem. Our approach relies on an implicit construction based on the Crandall-Rabinowitz bifurcation theorem, which allows us to detect branches of non-radial solutions bifurcating from a family of radial ones. The resulting examples highlight new geometric configurations of the torsion problem in the three-dimensional sphere, providing another proof of the fact that the rigidity of Serrin-type results can fail in the presence of curvature.

AI.tldr: 在三维球面S^3上构造了两类非平凡的Serrin区域，其边界既不是测地球面也不是Clifford环面，打破了Serrin型结果的刚性。
AI.motivation: 研究黎曼流形上的过定扭转问题（Serrin问题），在欧氏空间中Serrin证明只有球面解，但在弯曲空间中刚性可能失效。本文旨在探索三维球面S^3上非平凡Serrin区域的存在性。
AI.techniques: 使用Crandall-Rabinowitz分歧定理进行隐式构造，从径向解族分支出非径向解，通过分歧分析检测小体积和大体积两类解。
AI.main_theorems: 在S^3上构造了两类边界连通的Serrin区域：小体积和大体积类型，边界既非测地球面也非Clifford环面，作为经典对称解的非平凡扰动存在。
AI.significance: 首次在三维球面上展示非平凡Serrin区域，证明曲率存在时Serrin型刚性可能失效，为弯曲流形上的过定问题提供了新的几何构型。

title: A critical Hardy-Rellich inequality
summary: In this work, we prove a critical version of a Hardy-Rellich type inequality. We show that for $N\geq 1$ there exists a constant $C_N>0$ such that \[ \int_{\mathbb R^N}\left|\nabla\left(\frac{u(x)}{|x|}\right)\right|^N\,\mathrm{d}x\leq C_N\int_{\mathbb R^N}\left|Δu(x)\right|^N\,\mathrm{d}x, \] for any $u\in C^\infty_c(\mathbb R^N\setminus\left\{0\right\})$.

AI.tldr: 证明了Hardy-Rellich型不等式的临界版本，建立了关于径向导数与拉普拉斯算子之间的加权不等式关系
AI.motivation: Hardy不等式和Rellich不等式是偏微分方程理论中的基本工具，研究加权Sobolev空间中的函数估计。临界情形（指数p=N）具有特殊重要性，因为此时尺度不变性出现，需要建立相应的不等式关系
AI.techniques: 使用径向坐标变换、尺度分析、极值函数构造、临界指数情形下的变分方法，以及Hardy型不等式的精细估计技术
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于N≥1，存在常数C_N>0，使得对所有u∈C_c^∞(R^N\{0})，有∫|∇(u/|x|)|^N dx ≤ C_N∫|Δu|^N dx成立
AI.significance: 完善了Hardy-Rellich不等式理论，为临界指数情形下的椭圆型方程分析提供了新工具，在非线性椭圆方程、变分问题以及几何分析中有重要应用
